productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Navy Blue Dress
description: Style NoteMake your own casual fashion rules with this navy blue and white polka dotted dress from United Colours of Benetton. The pretty girl look is cute, while the cotton fabric will keep you feeling fresh and comfortable all day.Product DetailsNavy blue and white spaghetti polka dotted dress, has a straight neckline with lace around the neckline, an elasticated midriff with gathers below it and and has gathers above the hemMaterial and CareBlended fabricMachine wash coldDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
